patterns.decisionQuestion: Is this create/edit/submit action ready to save with a clear owner, scope, policy, and next route?
patterns.emptyStateCopy: No parent context is selected. Return to the parent list and start the action from a row or toolbar CTA.

typography: Action page H1 uses text-2xl or smaller; form labels and helper text use Forge text-sm/text-xs scale.
density: At a desktop review viewport, first viewport shows title, first field group, save/cancel action, and right context/preflight rail.
spacing: Use grouped fields with gap-4/gap-5; avoid a loose PageHeader plus scattered cards.
Keep explanatory copy short; do not add marketing-style descriptions above the form.
Use responsive rail constraints instead of fixed pixel sidebars.
borders: Use SurfaceCard with outline-fg-grey-200 and Forge form controls.
profileRegion: Use AppLayout topbar profile; action pages do not create custom profile blocks.
rightRail: Right rail shows context, readiness, validation, or changed-summary; it uses responsive min/max or clamp constraints and remains visible on desktop.

forbiddenShortcuts: Do not put action routes in sidebar navigation.
Do not use kicker/eyebrow or long explanatory copy above action forms.
Do not replace Cancel/Save with a menu-only action.
Do not define custom SectionCard, Button, Badge, Table, or generic card shells.

patterns.decisionQuestion: Which grouped fields changed, and can the user safely save or cancel?
patterns.emptyStateCopy: No record is loaded. Return to the parent list and reopen the edit action.

typography: Edit page H1 uses text-2xl or smaller; labels and helper text use text-sm/text-xs.
density: At a desktop review viewport, first viewport shows primary changed fields, validation/status, and save/cancel.
spacing: Use compact field groups; avoid gap-6/space-y-6 as default form rhythm.
Use responsive rail constraints instead of fixed pixel sidebars.
borders: Use subtle Forge outlines, not custom heavy card borders.
rightRail: Changed summary or validation rail stays compact, responsive, and visible on desktop.

forbiddenShortcuts: Do not show read-only detail history on the edit form.
Do not hide validation only in toast text.
